name: autoresearch-experiments
description: Cross-platform hyperparameter optimization experiments from autonomous LLM-driven ML research. An LLM agent (Claude Sonnet) autonomously proposes hyperparameter modifications, trains a small language model for 5 minutes, evaluates validation bits-per-byte (val_bpb), and iterates. Experiments span Apple Metal (M5 Max), NVIDIA CUDA (RTX 4000 Ada, A100 40GB, RTX Pro 6000 Blackwell), and AMD ROCm (MI300X) hardware platforms across 7 text datasets.

distribution.name: experiments.parquet
distribution.description: Unified experiment results across all hardware platforms, GPUs, and datasets

distribution.name: hardware.parquet
distribution.description: Hardware specifications reference table for all GPUs tested

recordSet.name: experiments
recordSet.description: Individual hyperparameter experiment results. Each row is one 5-minute training run with a specific hyperparameter configuration proposed by an LLM agent.

field.name: experiment_id
field.description: Globally unique identifier: {platform}_{gpu}_{dataset}_{run_id}_{exp}

field.name: platform
field.description: Hardware platform: apple_metal, nvidia_cuda, or amd_rocm

field.name: gpu_name
field.description: GPU model name (e.g., M5 Max, RTX 4000 Ada, A100 40GB, MI300X)

field.name: gpu_provider
field.description: Cloud provider or local: digitalocean, vultr, runpod, local

field.name: dataset
field.description: Training dataset name (e.g., climbmix, fineweb-edu, cosmopedia-v2)

field.name: agent_model
field.description: LLM agent version used to propose hyperparameters: sonnet-4.0 or sonnet-4.6

field.name: run_id
field.description: Identifier for the experiment run within a platform/GPU combination

field.name: exp
field.description: Experiment number within the run (e.g., exp0 is baseline)

field.name: description
field.description: LLM agent's description of the hyperparameter modification attempted

field.name: val_bpb
field.description: Validation bits-per-byte (lower is better). Primary metric. 0.0 indicates a crash.

field.name: peak_mem_gb
field.description: Peak GPU memory usage in gigabytes during training

field.name: tok_sec
field.description: Training throughput in tokens per second

field.name: mfu
field.description: Model FLOPs Utilization as a percentage

field.name: steps
field.description: Number of training steps completed in the 5-minute budget

field.name: status
field.description: Experiment outcome: baseline, keep (improved), discard (worse), or crash

field.name: notes
field.description: LLM agent's reasoning and analysis of the experiment result

recordSet.name: hardware
recordSet.description: Hardware specifications for each GPU platform tested, including compute capabilities, memory, power, and cost.

field.name: gpu_name
field.description: GPU model name (primary key)

field.name: platform
field.description: Hardware platform: apple_metal, nvidia_cuda, amd_rocm, or intel_gaudi

field.name: architecture
field.description: GPU architecture name (e.g., Ada Lovelace, CDNA 3, Apple GPU)

field.name: vram_gb
field.description: GPU memory in gigabytes

field.name: bf16_tflops
field.description: bf16 compute performance in TFLOPS

field.name: memory_bandwidth_gbps
field.description: Memory bandwidth in GB/s

field.name: tdp_watts
field.description: Thermal Design Power in watts

field.name: cost_per_hour
field.description: Cloud compute cost in USD per hour (0.0 for local hardware)
